creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194118
py-horizon-13.0.1.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-horizon to 13.0.1 (Queens Release Series).

Changes by upstream:
- https://docs.openstack.org/releasenotes/horizon/queens.html

Changes to the port:
- changed MASTER_SITES to upstream source
- added LICENSE_FILE
- changed BUILD_DEPENDS + RUN_DEPENDS to reflect the new dependencies
- changed FLAVOR to PY_FLAVOR
- added CONFLICTS_INSTALL
- updated pkg-message
- removed extra patches (can't be applied anymore because the code has changed top much)
- updated WWW

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK

Note:
Before this update can be committed following ports must be updated first:
- www/py-django-babel (see PR #228850: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=228850)
- www/py-django-psycss (see PR #228851: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=228851)
- devel/py-XStatic-Angular-Bootstrap (see PR #228679: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=228679)
- net/py-python-cinderclient (see PR #228690: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=228690)
- net/py-python-glanceclient (see PR #228691: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=228691)
- net/py-python-neutronclient (see PR #228701 : https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=228701)
